visual_summary: A decorated captive cell featuring Martian landscape murals and biological illustrations. The walls depict milk-producing plants, Martian moons, and planetary night cycles. The interior contains a fur-covered sleeping area and vessels for plant-derived milk.
layout_notes: Interior cell containing a sleeping area; a Watch Dog is positioned at the threshold.
lighting: Influenced by depicted night cycles on the murals; warmth provided by furs and food.
mood: Shifts from intimacy (Sola's care) to tension (presence of a guarding beast).
constraints: Lighting must reflect the depicted night cycles on the walls.
Presence of a watchful predator silhouette/Watch Dog at the threshold.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific dimensions or exact scale of the chamber are not defined.
